metadata.title: PCC vs. Metropolitan Market
metadata.methodology: Exact products matched by Instacart product ID. Current displayed prices were captured for the same delivery address. Weighted produce is compared at the displayed per-pound rate; all other rows compare one listed unit. Sale prices are included and flagged.
metadata.caveat: Prices and availability can change by location, fulfillment method, promotion, and time.
